title: freylinia undulata
intro: Freylinia undulata, also known as the Blue Butterfly Bush, is a shrubby perennial plant native to southern Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving headaches, and treating respiratory issues. Freylinia undulata can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used to support overall well-being.
